o There is full thickness tissue loss that involves exposure of fat or invasion 
of other tissue such as muscle or bone. 
 NOTE: Wounds or ulcers that show redness, edema, and induration, at 
times with epidermal blistering or desquamation do not ordinarily require 
skilled nursing care.
